title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Siemens Healthineers India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Siemens Healthineers India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Siemens Healthineers India in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens Healthineers India:
Siemens Healthineers India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India!
